description: Whether agents can spawn, delegate to, or resume other agents. Enables multi-agent coordination patterns.

claude-code.mechanism: main-thread agents spawn subagents via Agent tool; subagents cannot spawn further subagents; Agent(type) in tools allowlist restricts which subagent types are allowed

codex.mechanism: multi-agent V2 feature flag; max_threads controls concurrent agent count, max_depth controls nesting depth; spawn-agent tool initiates delegation

copilot-cli.mechanism: agents run as subagents with isolated context windows; Git-SHA-based versioning ensures consistency across PR interactions

kiro.mechanism: no subagent spawning mechanism documented for Kiro custom agents

windsurf.mechanism: no structured agent orchestration; AGENTS.md is rules injection piggybacking on the Rules engine, not an agent harness
